# WebTools - Complete Tool Directory
# URL: https://free-toolbase.com/
# Updated: 2026-07-14
# Total Tools: 1538+
# Language: English + Chinese (bilingual)
#
# This file provides a comprehensive directory of all tools available on WebTools.
# Each tool is a standalone web page that works entirely in the browser.
# No server uploads, no registration required, 100% free.
#
## Category Hub Pages
#

## Key Features

- **Pure Frontend**: All tools run entirely in the browser using JavaScript
- **Privacy First**: No data ever leaves your device
- **No Registration**: Use any tool instantly without signup
- **Bilingual**: Full English and Chinese support
- **Free Forever**: All tools are completely free
- **Open Source**: Source code available on GitHub

## Popular Tools

- [json-formatter](https://free-toolbase.com/en/json-formatter/)
- [password-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/password-generator/)
- [qr-code-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/qr-code-generator/)
- [base64-encode-decode](https://free-toolbase.com/en/base64-encode-decode/)
- [md5-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/md5-generator/)
- [sha256-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sha256-generator/)
- [url-encoder-decoder](https://free-toolbase.com/en/url-encoder-decoder/)
- [color-converter](https://free-toolbase.com/en/color-converter/)
- [image-resizer](https://free-toolbase.com/en/image-resizer/)
- [pdf-merge](https://free-toolbase.com/en/pdf-merge/)
- [sql-query-builder](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-query-builder/) - Visually build SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE SQL statements with JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY, ORDER BY
- [sql-to-prisma](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-prisma/) - Convert SQL schema to Prisma schema
- [sql-to-sequelize](https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-sequelize/) - Convert SQL schema to Sequelize.js models
- [openapi-to-typescript](https://free-toolbase.com/en/openapi-to-typescript/) - Convert OpenAPI/Swagger specs to TypeScript types
- [tailwind-shadow-generator](https://free-toolbase.com/en/tailwind-shadow-generator/) - Generate Tailwind CSS box-shadow utilities
- [redirect-tracer](https://free-toolbase.com/en/redirect-tracer/) - Trace URL redirect chains, detect 301/302/307/308 status codes, batch check supported
- [http-status-code-reference](https://free-toolbase.com/en/http-status-code-reference/) - Complete HTTP status code reference (1xx-5xx), search, filter by category, detailed explanations

## Chrome Extensions

- Hash Generator (MD5/SHA-1/SHA-256/SHA-512)
- JSON Formatter & Validator
- Password Generator
- QR Code Generator

- Feedback: dexshuang@google.com

### [HTTP Status Lookup](https://free-toolbase.com/http-status-lookup/)
- CN: https://free-toolbase.com/http-status-lookup/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Look up HTTP status codes and their meanings instantly. Supports all standard HTTP status codes (1xx-5xx) with detailed descriptions and usage guidance.

### [SQL to Sequelize](https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-sequelize/)
- CN: https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-sequelize/
- EN: https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-sequelize/
- Category: dev
- Description: Convert SQL CREATE TABLE statements to Sequelize.js model definitions. Supports data type mapping, associations, and hooks.

### [SQL to TypeScript Interface](https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-typescript-interface/)
- CN: https://free-toolbase.com/sql-to-typescript-interface/
- EN: https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-to-typescript-interface/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Convert SQL CREATE TABLE statements to TypeScript interfaces. Supports various SQL data types and generates clean, type-safe TypeScript definitions.
- fuzzy-string-matcher: https://free-toolbase.com/fuzzy-string-matcher/
- json-key-renamer: https://free-toolbase.com/json-key-renamer/
- sql-playground: https://free-toolbase.com/sql-playground/
- yaml-to-dotenv: https://free-toolbase.com/yaml-to-dotenv/
- npm-dependency-analyzer: https://free-toolbase.com/npm-dependency-analyzer/
- json-schema-diff: https://free-toolbase.com/json-schema-diff/
- meta-tag-extractor: https://free-toolbase.com/meta-tag-extractor/
- web-accessibility-checker: https://free-toolbase.com/web-accessibility-checker/

- json-to-go-struct: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-go-struct/ - JSON转Go结构体，支持嵌套struct、自定义标签(json/bson/gorm)、指针类型
- json-to-kotlin-class: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-kotlin-class/ - JSON转Kotlin数据类，支持Gson/Moshi/Kotlinx注解、嵌套类、可空类型
- json-to-swift-struct: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-swift-struct/ - JSON转Swift结构体，支持Codable协议、CodingKeys、可选类型
- json-to-php-object: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-php-object/ - JSON转PHP类，支持PHP8命名参数构造函数、类型属性、Getter/Setter
- json-to-rust-struct: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-rust-struct/ - JSON转Rust结构体，支持serde标签、Option类型、Vec类型
- http-status-lookup: https://free-toolbase.com/http-status-lookup/ - HTTP状态码查询工具，支持搜索、分类浏览、详细说明

## ENV to JSON Converter
- URL: https://free-toolbase.com/env-to-json/
- EN URL: https://free-toolbase.com/en/env-to-json/
- Category: dev
- Description: Convert .env files to JSON format. Supports nested variables, comments, and quoted values. Pure frontend, no server upload.

## JSON to Avro Schema Converter
- URL: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-avro/
- EN URL: https://free-toolbase.com/en/json-to-avro/
- Category: dev
- Description: Convert JSON data to Apache Avro schema format. Supports all Avro types, nested records, and array/map types. Pure frontend, no server upload.

## Markdown to React Converter
- URL: https://free-toolbase.com/markdown-to-react/
- EN URL: https://free-toolbase.com/en/markdown-to-react/
- Category: dev
- Description: Convert Markdown text to React JSX components with live preview. Supports CommonMark, GFM, and custom components. Pure frontend, no server upload.

- EN URL: https://free-toolbase.com/en/sql-format/
- Category: dev
- Description: Format and beautify SQL queries with customizable indentation. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, Oracle dialects. Pure frontend, no server upload.

## Morse Decoder
- URL: https://free-toolbase.com/morse-decoder/
- EN URL: https://free-toolbase.com/en/morse-decoder/
- Description: Free online Morse code decoder. Convert Morse code to text and text to Morse code. Supports real-time decoding, audio playback with adjustable speed, and one-click copy.
- Category: Text Tools
- Features: Morse-to-text, text-to-Morse, audio playback, adjustable speed, one-click copy/download

- Description: Free online XML beautifier and formatter. Format XML with proper indentation, validate syntax, minify XML, and customize indent settings. Pure frontend processing.
- Category: Developer Tools
- Features: XML formatting, syntax validation, minification, customizable indent, one-click copy/download

- Category: dev
- Description: Convert HTML to well-formed XML online. Handles namespace handling, attribute preservation, and formatting options. Pure frontend, no server upload.

- Category: dev
- Description: Convert cron expressions to human-readable descriptions. Supports 5-field and 6-field cron format with multiple language outputs. Pure frontend processing.

- Category: dev
- Description: Explain SQL queries in plain language. Breaks down SELECT, JOIN, WHERE, GROUP BY, HAVING clauses with visual formatting and optimization tips. Pure frontend.

- Category: dev
- Description: Test, debug and visualize regex patterns with real-time matching. Supports flags, capture groups, match highlighting, and pattern explanation. Pure frontend processing.

### JSON to Pydantic
- URL: https://free-toolbase.com/json-to-pydantic/
- EN: https://free-toolbase.com/en/json-to-pydantic/
- Category: dev
- Description: Convert JSON data to Pydantic model classes with type inference

- Category: dev
- Description: Convert Pug template syntax to HTML markup

- Description: Free online Apache .htaccess generator. Visually configure URL rewrites, 301 redirects, caching policies, security headers, Gzip compression, hotlink protection

## Kubernetes YAML Generator
- URL: /kubernetes-yaml-generator/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Free online Kubernetes YAML generator. Visually configure Deployment, Service, ConfigMap, Secret, Ingress resources. One-click generate standard YAML

## Terraform HCL Formatter
- URL: /terraform-hcl-formatter/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Free online Terraform HCL formatter. Auto-indent, align equals, sort blocks, preserve comments. Instantly clean up messy HCL code

## Caddyfile Generator
- URL: /caddyfile-generator/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Free online Caddy config generator. Visual builder for reverse proxy, static sites, auto HTTPS certificates, redirects

## HAProxy Config Generator
- URL: /haproxy-config-generator/
- Category: Developer Tools
- Description: Free online HAProxy config generator. Visual builder for load balancing, reverse proxy, SSL termination, health checks
